feeds.title: 药物 · 临床试验
feeds.term: (lecanemab OR donanemab OR "anti-amyloid" OR "tau-targeting" OR trontinemab) AND ("clinical trial"[Publication Type] OR phase OR efficacy)

feeds.title: 机制 · 基础研究
feeds.term: ("Alzheimer Disease"[Mesh]) AND (amyloid OR tau OR neuroinflammation OR APOE OR microglia) AND (mechanism OR pathology OR pathogenesis)

feeds.title: 诊断 · 生物标志物
feeds.term: (Alzheimer) AND ("p-tau217" OR "plasma biomarker" OR "blood biomarker" OR "amyloid PET" OR "GFAP") AND (diagnosis OR detection OR screening)

feeds.title: 预防 · 生活方式
feeds.term: (Alzheimer OR dementia) AND (prevention OR diet OR exercise OR "cognitive reserve" OR lifestyle OR "physical activity") AND (cohort OR "risk factor" OR longitudinal)

feeds.title: 新手村 · 入门综述
feeds.term: ("Alzheimer Disease"[Mesh]) AND ("Review"[Publication Type]) AND (overview OR introduction OR "current understanding" OR primer OR basics)

drug.title: Longitudinal biomarkers in dementia with Lewy bodies: A systematic review and meta-analysis.
drug.zh: 系统综述和荟萃分析发现，路易体痴呆中仅全脑萎缩率与临床进展显著相关。

drug.title: Anti-amyloid therapy eligibility in a longitudinal brain-donor cohort with post mortem confirmation.
drug.zh: 纵向尸检队列中，仅约25%早期病理确诊AD患者符合抗淀粉样蛋白治疗资格，血管病变与APOEε4纯合子为主要排除因素。

drug.title: Quantifying Short-Term Functional Changes After Lecanemab Treatment in Early Alzheimer's Disease: An Exploratory 3-Month Follow-Up Case Report Using Eye Movement and Gait Analysis.
drug.zh: Lecanemab治疗3个月后，眼球运动与步态分析可量化早期阿尔茨海默病患者的短期功能变化。

drug.title: The potential of key Alzheimer's plasma biomarkers to mimic tau PET MUBADA-based disease staging.
drug.zh: 血浆P-tau217等关键生物标志物可替代tau-PET对阿尔茨海默病进行精准分期，尤其适用于低至中度tau-PET负荷患者。

drug.title: Immunotherapy with B28, an antibody to Aβ oligomers, potently decreases amyloid plaques, microgliosis, and memory decline in APP knock-in mice.
drug.zh: B28抗体通过清除Aβ寡聚体和斑块，显著减轻APP敲入小鼠的淀粉样病理、小胶质细胞增生和记忆衰退。

drug.title: The mechanisms and strategies for Alzheimer's disease prevention: An update.
drug.zh: 本综述强调通过管理高血压、糖尿病、优化微量元素与维生素及规律运动等可调控风险因素，是当前阿尔茨海默病预防的核心策略。

drug.title: Simulation of long-term lecanemab treatment effect on Alzheimer's disease progression.
drug.zh: 模拟显示，仑卡奈单抗治疗可使阿尔茨海默病从轻度认知障碍进展至重度的时间延缓约4.3-5.1年。

drug.title: FDA Approval of Donanemab-azbt: A New Dawn in Alzheimer's Disease Treatment.
drug.zh: FDA批准donanemab-azbt标志着阿尔茨海默病治疗从对症转向靶向β-淀粉样蛋白的新阶段。

mech.title: Neuropathologic Correlates of Seizures in Patients With Alzheimer Disease and Dementia With Lewy Bodies.
mech.zh: AD与DLB患者癫痫发作的神经病理学基础不同，且与AD病理负荷及TDP-43蛋白病变独立相关。

mech.title: Neuropsychological Profile and Cognitive Trajectories of Patients With Biomarker Evidence of Alzheimer Disease or Dementia With Lewy bodies.
mech.zh: 混合病理的AD与DLB患者认知轨迹异于单一病理，血浆标志物可区分其认知特征。

mech.title: Variations of global brain asymmetry are associated with aging and related diseases.
mech.zh: 全球脑不对称性变异与阿尔茨海默病等衰老相关疾病的诊断特异性改变密切相关。

mech.title: Alzheimer's disease proteome-wide association study implicates adaptive immunity and identifies risk genes LILRB1 and SIRPA.
mech.zh: AD全蛋白质组关联研究揭示免疫通路关键风险基因LILRB1和SIRPA。

mech.title: The protective role of melatonin on the brain in a rat model of Alzheimer's disease.
mech.zh: 褪黑素通过抗氧化与抗炎机制，显著减轻铝诱导的阿尔茨海默病大鼠模型脑损伤与认知衰退。

mech.title: Calibrating microglia states in Alzheimer's disease: decoding immune-metabolic networks and nano-targeted multicomponent therapies.
mech.zh: 小胶质细胞免疫-代谢网络失调是阿尔茨海默病关键驱动，纳米靶向多组分疗法可精准调控其状态。

mech.title: Brain Endothelial Glycocalyx as a Blood-Facing Translational Interface in Alzheimer's Disease: Beyond "Leaky" Barriers Toward Repair-First Stratification.
mech.zh: 脑内皮糖萼在阿尔茨海默病中呈现早期黏蛋白域特异性缺失，而非均匀脱落，可作为修复优先分层新靶点。

mech.title: APOE Genotype Modifies the Predictive Performance of Plasma Biomarkers for Amyloid Plaque Burden in Subjective Cognitive Decline.
mech.zh: APOE ε4基因型显著影响血浆标志物对主观认知下降者脑内β-淀粉样蛋白沉积的预测效能。

dx.title: Neuropsychological Profile and Cognitive Trajectories of Patients With Biomarker Evidence of Alzheimer Disease or Dementia With Lewy bodies.
dx.zh: 混合病理的AD与DLB患者认知轨迹更差，血浆标志物可区分其基线特征。

dx.title: Longitudinal biomarkers in dementia with Lewy bodies: A systematic review and meta-analysis.
dx.zh: 路易体痴呆症纵向生物标志物系统综述显示，脑萎缩与临床进展显著相关。

dx.title: Performing multiple biomarker tests delays initiation of amyloid-targeting treatments.
dx.zh: 多标志物检测顺序使用会显著延迟阿尔茨海默病淀粉样蛋白靶向治疗的启动时间。

dx.title: APOE Genotype Modifies the Predictive Performance of Plasma Biomarkers for Amyloid Plaque Burden in Subjective Cognitive Decline.
dx.zh: APOE ε4基因型显著影响血浆生物标志物对主观认知下降者脑内淀粉样蛋白斑块负荷的预测效能。

dx.title: Quantifying Short-Term Functional Changes After Lecanemab Treatment in Early Alzheimer's Disease: An Exploratory 3-Month Follow-Up Case Report Using Eye Movement and Gait Analysis.
dx.zh: 伦卡奈单抗治疗3个月后，早期AD患者的眼动与步态分析可量化短期功能改善。

dx.title: Association of inflammatory fluid biomarkers with the progression of Alzheimer's disease: a protocol for a systematic review and meta-analysis.
dx.zh: 系统综述与荟萃分析方案揭示，炎症生物标志物水平随阿尔茨海默病进展阶段呈现差异。

dx.title: Near‑Infrared Photobiomodulation in White‑Matter Disease: From Microglial States to Measurable Endpoints.
dx.zh: 近红外光生物调节通过调控小胶质细胞状态促进白质损伤修复，改善阿尔茨海默病相关病理终点。

dx.title: Blood-based biomarker discovery in motor neuron disease using nucleic acid-linked immuno-sandwich assay.
dx.zh: NULISA超灵敏血液检测可识别运动神经元病的新型蛋白标志物，优于传统Simoa法。

prev.title: Spatiotemporal Associations Between Cortical Microinfarcts and Cortical Superficial Siderosis in Cerebral Amyloid Angiopathy.
prev.zh: 皮质微梗死与皮质表面铁沉积在脑淀粉样血管病中存在时空关联，提示铁沉积可能促进局部缺血损伤。

prev.title: Cerebral Artery Pulsatility, Premorbid Blood Pressure, and Small Vessel Disease on Brain Imaging: A Population-Based Study.
prev.zh: 脑动脉搏动指数升高与脑小血管病独立相关，且不受既往血压等血管危险因素影响。

prev.title: Interhospital variation in Medicare spending for infections after coronary artery bypass grafting and surgical aortic valve replacement.
prev.zh: 冠脉搭桥及主动脉瓣术后感染率医院间差异达40%，高感染率医院医保支出显著更高。

prev.title: Population-level interventions for dementia prevention: a systematic review.
prev.zh: 针对痴呆可调控风险因素的人群干预效果有限，个性化教育比大众媒体更有效。

prev.title: Sodium-Glucose Cotransporter 2 Inhibitors and Dementia Risk in Patients With Psychiatric Disorders.
prev.zh: SGLT2抑制剂可显著降低精神障碍患者痴呆风险，尤其对老年人群保护作用明确。

prev.title: Polygenic Score Identifies Athletes at Increased Risk for Slower Recovery After Sport-Related Concussion: A Concussion Assessment, Research, and Education (CARE) Consortium Study.
prev.zh: 多基因风险评分可预测运动员脑震荡后恢复缓慢风险，为个性化治疗提供依据。

prev.title: National trends and disparities in mortality among U.S. older adults, with coexisting Alzheimer's disease and hypertension, 1999-2023.
prev.zh: 1999至2023年美国老年人群中阿尔茨海默病合并高血压的死亡率呈上升趋势，且存在显著的种族、性别及城乡差异。

prev.title: The Silent Crisis: Loneliness in Older Adults-A Critical Review of Impacts, Strategies and Path Forward.
prev.zh: 孤独感独立于社会隔离，显著增加老年人认知衰退与痴呆风险，其危害堪比吸烟。

intro.title: Calibrating microglia states in Alzheimer's disease: decoding immune-metabolic networks and nano-targeted multicomponent therapies.
intro.zh: 这篇综述讲的是大脑里的小卫士（小胶质细胞）如何影响阿尔茨海默病，并介绍了能精准调节它们的新药思路，帮普通人理解未来治疗方向。

intro.title: Brain Endothelial Glycocalyx as a Blood-Facing Translational Interface in Alzheimer's Disease: Beyond "Leaky" Barriers Toward Repair-First Stratification.
intro.zh: 这篇综述讲的是大脑血管表面一层糖膜在阿尔茨海默病中如何受损，帮普通人理解未来可能通过修复这层膜来更早诊断或治疗这种病。

intro.title: HDAC3 in Alzheimer's Disease: established evidence, unresolved questions, and translational priorities.
intro.zh: 这篇综述讲的是大脑里一种叫HDAC3的蛋白质可能和老年痴呆有关，但证据还不够硬，普通人看了能知道这个方向离治病还差多远。

intro.title: Advances in 3D cell culture models for alzheimer's disease drug discovery.
intro.zh: 这篇综述讲的是用更逼真的立体脑细胞模型来测试老年痴呆药物，让普通人知道新药研发可能更靠谱、更有效。

intro.title: From Tradition to Translation: A Critical Appraisal of Bacopa monnieri for Neuroprotection from Preclinical and Clinical Perspectives and Challenges in Utilization.
intro.zh: 这篇综述讲的是用草药“假马齿苋”能不能保护大脑、延缓老年痴呆，对普通人来说，就是看它能不能成为吃药之外的另一种选择。

intro.title: Neuroinflammation in Alzheimer's Disease (AD) and Glioblastoma (GBM): Shared Mechanisms and Therapeutic Insights.
intro.zh: 这篇综述讲的是大脑发炎在两种病里起的作用不同，看懂它，能帮你理解为什么老年痴呆和脑瘤的治疗思路不一样。

intro.title: Battling Parkinson's and Alzheimer's: The Neuroprotective Power of Carnosic Acid.
intro.journal: Journal of biochemical and molecular tox
intro.zh: 这篇综述讲的是迷迭香里的一种天然成分如何保护大脑、对抗帕金森和阿尔茨海默病，帮你了解日常饮食中可能存在的护脑小帮手。

intro.title: IL-4 in Alzheimer's Disease-Mechanisms and Therapeutic Potential.
intro.zh: 这篇综述讲的是大脑里一种叫IL-4的免疫信号物质，对阿尔茨海默病到底是有益还是有害，帮你了解未来可能的治疗方向。
